vipcbuilder.text:
This weekend bring your Mother to our Pokémon Chaos Rising Prerelease!  For Mothers Day Mom's get $5 off to play in our Event! Already signed up? We will put $5 Store Credit on your account! 
Also we have Trade Day running so bring your binders to check what other collectors are bringing in store and maybe find your chase card! Flesh and Blood is Silver Age this weekend so get your commons and rares ready.

#mothersdaygift #mothersday #fridaynightmagic #armorynight #FleshAndBloodTCG #lgs #localgamestore #pokemontcg #pokémon

Don't forget about Jedi on the Fourth and don't forget about our events this Month!  May is jam packed for TCG enthusiasts with Prereleases in both Pokémon and Flesh and Blood.  Magic players don't have to feel left out though, there is the Strixhaven Open the Archive Draft to Attend!

 #fridaynightmagic #armorynight #FleshAndBloodTCG #localgamestore #lgs #pokemontcg #pokémon

May The Fourth be with you!  We at VI PC Builder and Games have been studying The Force, meditating and growing stronger.  Through that we have learned that we are able to unify those looking for Star Wars Games and the Games themselves with each other!  Reach out to us on your Comlink or through The Force (Email or Phone, you decide which is which) to see what we can get in for you!  Happy Star Wars Day and May The Force be with you!

Phone: 250-815-0443
Email: info@vipcbuilder.ca

 #StarWarsDay #starwarsunlimited #starwarslegions #starwarsshatterpoint  #localgamestore #lgs

simu.fy.text:
¡Ya somos 20.000 en Instagram y queremos celebrarlo a lo grande junto a @borja_zazo! 🥳

Te puedes llevar todo esto valorado en más de 1.200€:
🏎‍ Volante P1 Eau Rouge PLUS Fibra de Carbono Forged 
🧤 Guantes Simufy
👕 Camiseta Simufy Esports

¿Cómo participar?
✔️ Sigue a @simu.fy y @borja_zazo
✔️ Dale like a esta publicación
✔️ Comenta etiquetando a tu amigo simracer
✔️ Comparte este reel en stories para conseguir participaciones extra

Puedes participar tantas veces como quieras, siempre que etiquetes a personas diferentes. 

📅 Tienes hasta el 31/05/2026 a las 23:59h
🏆 Anunciaremos el ganador/a el 01/06/2026 en stories

Sorteo internacional (+18)
Bases legales en el link de la bio

¡Gracias por formar parte de Simufy! 🧡

#simufy #borjazazo #sorteo #giveaway

Este año @ferminaldeguer_54 se ha portado muy bien

Rookie del Año de MotoGP 2025 🏆
Temporada de nivel. Ritmo, talento y trabajo constante

Así que Papá Noel lo tenía claro:
🎁 Su regalo más deseado tenía que estar a la altura

Un simulador exclusivo y totalmente personalizado, montado a medida para el piloto de @gresiniracing, pensado para que en el parón entre temporadas pueda seguir compitiendo: entrenar, desconectar, echarle horas… y picarse como si estuviera en pista 😏

🤩 Otro piloto de élite que se une a la familia Simufy
Estamos enormemente orgullosos de formar parte de su día a día como herramienta de entrenamiento y diversión
 
Gracias por confiar en nosotros con un simulador que no es solo para disfrutar, sino para mantener el ritmo, afinar sensaciones y seguir mejorando incluso cuando no hay carreras

Fue un día increíble, rodeados de motor, buen rollo y mucha pasión, en el que además grabamos contenido muy 🔝 que verás muy pronto por aquí y en nuestro canal de YouTube 👀🚀

Esto es entrenar de verdad, también fuera del circuito
Bienvenido a Simufy, Fermín 🧡

#simufy #motogp #ferminaldeguer #gresiniracing

tracksvr.text:
‼️ Attention Calgary Sim Racers ‼️ 

Tonight is the last Drop-In Night of our GT3 Spring Series! Take to the hills of Brands Hatch in your choice of GT3 car and put your skills to the test against other drivers at TracksVR. Only $39.95 per session! 
.
.
.
#tracksvr #yyc #calgary #simracing #gt3

TracksVR is proud to announce Drop-In Night.

Every Tuesday, step into a full race event experience with no booking required.

Choose your session at 6:00, 7:00, or 8:00 PM and take your place on the grid.

Each week brings something new with different cars, different tracks, and a fresh challenge every time.

Whether you are new to sim racing or focused on improving lap times, this is your opportunity to experience structured competition in a full race format.

Drop-In Night at TracksVR. Every Tuesday. Be on the grid.
#simracing #yyc #tracksvr #calgary

befastracing.text:
¡Atención amantes del SimRacing!

Conoce algunas de las marcas que tenemos disponibles, desde las más reconocidas hasta las que están marcando tendencia, ¡todas están aquí!

Compra con confianza y seguridad, No te arriesgues con tiendas poco confiables. Nosotros te respaldamos en todo momento y además hacemos válida cualquier garantía.

 ¡No te pierdas esta oportunidad de adquirir productos de las mejores marcas a precios increíbles!

Visita befastracing.com y descubre todas las marcas que tenemos disponibles. Si tienes alguna duda o necesitas ayuda en tu compra, nuestro equipo está listo para ayudarte.

¡Gracias por confiar en nosotros! #BeFast

Lo que empezó como una pasión… hoy se convierte en algo histórico. 🏁

Nos llena de orgullo anunciar que somos distribuidores oficiales de Fanatec en México.

Después de años impulsando el simracing en el país, damos un paso que cambia todo: traer de manera oficial una de las marcas más importantes del mundo.

A partir de ahora, Fanatec tiene presencia oficial en México, con acceso directo a su ecosistema profesional, respaldo de marca, stock local, soporte y garantía en el país.

Esto marca un nuevo estándar:
mejores precios, más confianza, mejor experiencia y un verdadero siguiente nivel para el simracing en México.

No es solo una nueva etapa para nosotros.
Es un paso enorme para toda la comunidad.

Gracias por ser parte de este camino.

Hoy, Fanatec México es una realidad.

Bienvenidos al siguiente nivel.

Powered by Be Fast Racing.
befastracing.com

Vive la adrenalina de las pistas desde casa 🏎️🔥
En Be Fast Racing tenemos los mejores productos de las marcas más top para que armes tu setup soñado 🎮⚡

👉 ¿Listo para ser parte de la comunidad Be Fast Racing? 🚦

#SimRacing #BeFastRacing #Simuladores #fyp #pcgaming

simmotionus.text:
SimNet SP Pro Loadcell Pedals are now in stock 🚨

Upgrade your Fanatec and Gran Turismo setup with pro-grade realism 🔥
— Fully adjustable feel
— Loadcell brake up to 100kg
— Optional haptics for full-tilt immersion

Connect to your Fanatec base via RJ12 or plug straight into PC.

Best suited for drivers who’ve outgrown entry-level pedals and want more brake consistency and adjustability. ⚡

#SimRacing #LoadcellPedals #FanatecUpgrade #GranTurismo #SimMotion #SimRigSetup #SimGear #SimNetSPPro

Built by sim racers, for sim racers.

At Sim Motion, we believe buying sim racing gear should come with real guidance, fast shipping, and support from people who actually know the hardware inside and out.

Whether you’re building your first setup or upgrading to your dream rig, our team is here to help you find the right gear for the way you drive.

Find your setup at the link in bio 🏁

#SimRacing #RacingSimulator #SimMotion #SimRacingGear #YourRigYourRules

From Spokane to Virginia Tech 🏁

We’re incredibly proud to support Virginia Tech Motorsports as they begin building their program’s first simulator setup.

Watching the team unbox their new gear and take the first steps toward bringing this project to life is exactly why partnerships like this matter. Supporting the next generation of drivers, engineers, and motorsports innovators is something we’re so excited to be part of.

We can’t wait to see the full build come together and follow their journey from here. Huge thanks to the Virginia Tech Motorsports team for sharing these moments with us!

#SimMotion #VirginiaTech #FormulaSAE #SimRacing #Motorsports

simking_eu.text:
Tester avant d’acheter ?

Nos experts vous accueillent sur rendez-vous dans un espace de 100 m² dédié au simracing et à la simulation de vol, dans notre showroom situé entre Aix-en-Provence et Marseille.

Sur place, on prend le temps d’échanger sur votre pratique, vos attentes et votre budget, puis on vous fait tester différentes configurations.

Simulateurs 3DOF et 4DOF, Direct Drive, pédaliers haut de gamme, cockpits et flight sim…
Vous testerez du matériel MOZA Racing, Heusinkveld et NextLevelRacing, Simrig, D-Box, Dof Reality... principalement sur PC.

📍 À proximité de Marseille
📆 Visites uniquement sur rendez-vous
💬 Intéressé(e) par une visite ? Dites-le en commentaire et partagez !

🇫🇷 Le Wheel Stand Lite 2.0 : l'alternative parfaite pour les pilotes qui veulent du lourd sans pour autant encombrer tout leur salon. 👀🔥

Pour seulement 159€, c’est le raccourci idéal pour booster vos sensations de course. Vous l'installez, vous bloquez votre fauteuil, et vous voilà sur la grille de départ en un clin d'œil. Pas besoin d'une pièce dédiée ni d'un montage interminable. Installez-vous et pilotez ! 🏁🎮🚀

🇺🇸🇬🇧 The Wheel Stand Lite 2.0: the perfect alternative for racers who want a heavy-duty experience without cluttering their entire living room. 👀🔥

At just €159, it’s the ultimate shortcut to boosting your racing sensations. Set it up, lock your chair in place, and you’re on the starting grid in the blink of an eye. No need for a dedicated room or endless assembly. Just jump in and drive! 🏁🎮🚀

Rendez-vous directement sur Simking.eu pour le commander

@nextlevelracing
#Simracing #Simracer #SimRacingHardware #RacingSim #VirtualRacing #MotorsportSim

🇫🇷 Tu débutes dans le simracing ?

Voici un premier setup idéal pour s’équiper avec du matériel accessible et haut de gamme, pensé pour progresser dans les meilleures conditions 👌

focussimracing.text:
Meet the FSR Eighty.

The foundation of the Focus lineup.

Laser-cut steel. CNC-machined connection points. Built for rigidity where it matters most.

Designed for serious drivers—and built to grow with you.

Step up to the One Twenty when you’re ready for maximum rigidity.

Built in California. #simrig #simracing #losangeles

FSR One Twenty.

Built for higher loads, increased rigidity, and precise adjustability.

Oversized 40×120 structural extrusion paired with CNC-machined connection points creates a chassis designed to minimize flex and maximize consistency.

CNC-indexed upright adjustment and a notched pedal system make dialing in your position simple and repeatable.

Every detail is engineered with purpose.

Built in California.

#simracing #simrig #losangeles

FSR One Sixty.

Built for maximum rigidity, higher loads, and precise repeatability.

Oversized 40×160 structural extrusion forms the foundation, paired with the Side Mount Pro system for a more rigid and stable wheelbase connection.

Indexed wheelbase height adjustment and a notched pedal system allow for fast, consistent setup changes without guesswork.

From structure to adjustment, every component is engineered to reduce flex and improve driver confidence.

Built in California.

#simracing #simrig #losangeles

wearemaxgaming.text:
KBDfans GT-80 Case - Anodized Silver
• Flexible ball catch structure for individual adjustment
• Brass weight bar for cleaner sound and stability
• Stylish aluminum design with symmetrical USB interface
• Sound-absorbing and protective silicone bumpers

WOOTING 80HE Module - ISO
• Modular 80% TKL keyboard
• 8K Hz polling and analog scanning
• For users who want to customize switches and keycaps
• Per-key analog input with adjustable activation
• Support for hot-swappable switches and RGB lighting

MAXCUSTOM Blank Keycap set - Black
• Matches MX-style switches
• High-quality PBT with 1.5mm in thickness
• Matches both ANSI and ISO keyboards up to TKL size
• Cherry profile
• Matches 60%, 65% and 75%, TKL and Full Size keyboards

GATERON Magnetic Jade Ruby HE Linear Switch
• Type:  Linear
• Initial Force:  36±5gf
• Total Travel: 3.5±0.1mm
• Bottom-out Force: 50±10gf
• Initial Magnetic Flux: 120±8GS (PCB1.2mm)
• Bottom-out Magnetic Flux: 700±30GS (PCB1.2mm)
• Spring:  20mm Customized Spring
• Lubrication:  Factory Lubed
• Pre-travel:  Freely Setting
• Keystrokes:  150 Million

Picking a winner of the Asus ROG Falchion Ace 75 HE Gaming Keyboard 💥 

The ROG Falchion Ace 75 HE is a gaming keyboard from Asus that combines advanced technology with comfort and style. Featuring ROG HFX V2 magnetic switches, the keyboard offers a hot-swappable function for easy customization of actuation points between 0.1 and 3.5 mm. The built-in ROG Hall sensor enhances the precision of your keystrokes while minimizing electrical noise for optimal performance.

The build quality is consistently high, featuring robust ROG doubleshot PBT keycaps that not only feel great under your fingers but are also resistant to wear and tear. The ergonomic design includes three adjustable tilt angles and six layers of dampening to minimize noise and echo during use. With an 8000 Hz polling rate, the keyboard achieves a response time of 0.125 ms, meaning it is up to eight times faster than competitors’ models. For intuitive control, a multi-wheel is included to fine-tune the actuation point and Rapid Trigger sensitivity, alongside an interactive media control panel.

•	Hot-swappable ROG HFX V2 switches
•	Tailored for gamers seeking high performance
•	Enhanced precision with the ROG Hall sensor
•	8000 Hz polling rate

racegeareu.text:
Ukázka high-end SimRacingového rigu dodaného pod vánoční stromeček firmou @racegeareu r našemu velkému klientovi do Brna.

Jednalo se o kompletní profesionální stavbu od a do z. Od úvodních konzultací, přes detailní výběr komponent včetně počítače a monitoru, po složení, instalaci, dovoz, zapojení na místě a následný couching. Jednoduše řečeno all-incusive služba.

Na rigu byli použity pouze komponenty nejvyšší kvality, podrobný list níže:

Volantová základna - @simucube  2 Pro 
Pedály - @simucube aktivní pedály (plyn ve variantě Pro, brzda ve variantě Ultimate) 
Konstrukce kokpitu - @opggfi OverPower GT Pro verze včetně elektrického posuvu pedálu, držáku PC, klávesnice a myši
GT volanty - Karbonový @rexingsteeringwheels GT volant Timun & @simucube Tahko kulatý černý volant
Formulové volanty - @ascher.racing McLaren Artura Pro & @rexingsteeringwheels Mayaris 2
Sedačka včetně držáku a pojezdu -@sparco_official Evo L s příslušenstvím
PC - high-end s grafickou kartou Nvidia RTX4080 (počítáno s upgradem na RTX5090)
Hlavní monitor - Super ultrawide Samsung Neo 57 palců 240Hz
Dashboard monitor - Dell 27 palců 165Hz
Reproduktory pro diváky - SteelSeries Arena 3

Celá stavba byla mířená k simulaci různých modelů vozů Porsche. V tuto chvíli je to základ, který bude expandovat dál skrze velice zajímavé komponenty právě s tématikou Porsche.

Projekt byl náročný, ale také velice zábavný, posuďte stavbu alespoň na fotkách sami :). 

Presentation of high-end SimRacing rig delivered for Christmas by @racegear company to our big client to Brno city in Czech republic.

Setup with its components is visible above.

It was a complete design and build of the rig from a to z. From vision, over consultation to detail pick of all components including PC and monitor to actual build, installation, delivery, establishment with following couching. Simply said all-inclusive service.

It was demanding project, but real fun, you can review it at least from the photos yourself :).

Thanks for support!

#weneverstoplookingforgap #thisisourworld #simucube #racegeareu #simracing #simracinghardware #esport

Czech SimRacing Series 2025 - Grand Final in Prague: 𝐃𝐨𝐧𝐞 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐃𝐮𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐝

The Grand Final of the Czech SimRacing Series 2025 at the @praguecarfestival delivered extremely close racing, strong performances and a professional atmosphere across both categories – Czech National and International.
Thank you to all drivers for clean battles, discipline and a highly competitive level throughout the entire event.

Finals Results - 1st to 8th

1. David Tóth
2. Martin Tóth
3. Angelo Michel
4. Jan Haladej
5. Lukáš Přáda
6. Erwin Liszkowicz
7. Balazs Palla
8. Marcell Morocz

9th to 16th Semi Finals:

Kevin Aebi
Stebler Dylan
Samuel Foniok
František Kaštovský
Adam Vařeka
Gázser Gergő Marcell
Sergio Gurdiel Ferreiro
Adam Celárek

17th to 28th (Elimination Stage):

Drivers in this group advanced through a demanding Time Attack. The field was very close this year, and reaching the Top 28 required real consistency.

Milan Šádek
Oliver Gmuca
Lukáš Uhlík
Petr Hermoch
Mees Ketelaar
Jacopo Hrynečko
David Bieroš
Sophia Papáyová
Kristýna Dytrtová
František Vala
Lukáš Vysoký
Sebastian Bobek

𝐁𝐢𝐠 𝐓𝐡𝐚𝐧𝐤 𝐘𝐨𝐮 𝐭𝐨 𝐎𝐮𝐫 𝐏𝐚𝐫𝐭𝐧𝐞𝐫𝐬:

@moza_racing_official – for providing the R12 Direct Drive bases and FSR 2.0 formula steering wheels
Křenek Motorsport & @racingfuel_simulators – for generous prizes and technical support
@simucube – for excellent prizes
@aditis_racing, @praguecarfestival and @racing.journal for their support and contribution
@opggfi 

Special Thanks – @pavel_fab, @autoklubcr & @fiawec_official

We extend our sincere appreciation to Autoklub České republiky and FIA for their guidance and support throughout the season. Their involvement helped ensure a professional, fair and internationally aligned competition.

Thanks to Organising Team

Our big thanks also go to everyone involved in the event’s execution: 
Organizators: @racegeareu
Commentators: @pavel_fab & @joshuax_cz 
Event directors: @martinsirotek_simracer & Josef Křenek
Technical staff: @petr_simecka & @matty.g.11
Stewards: @martiin_kadlecik & @fiala.vojtech
Production crew: @proesportcz & @lukas.redl
Media staff: @nkcsoka & @lukasv.raw

#CzechSimRacingSeries #Simracing #Motorsport #esport

🏁 Proud to be Official Distributor

We’re proud to announce that RaceGear is an official distributor of @bavariansimtec.

Their steering wheels represent absolute top-tier German engineering, precision and uncompromising quality — and we’re excited to bring them directly to our customers.

Including the brand new Delta Pro SC, the first fully wireless display wheel for Simucube 3 bases, a wide selection of Bavarian SimTec products is now available in our shop — with many models in stock and ready to ship.

🛒 Available at:
👉 https://www.racegear.eu

Thank you to @bavariansimtec  for the trust. Looking forward to a strong partnership. 🤝

#RaceGear #BavarianSimTec #SimRacing #OfficialDistributor #GermanEngineering

Thank you to everyone who came to the annual Overclockers UK car meet on Saturday! 🏎💨

We hope you all enjoyed chasing lap times on our sim racing rigs, checking out the latest OcUK PC builds, grabbing pizza & coffee or even just getting the opportunity to chat with likeminded people! ✨

pitlanesimracing.text:
In 2019, we launched as the first sim racing to ship free. It set the stage for every major sim shop that followed. We are changing the game. Again. 

Our upcoming Sim Racing Connected app is going to change how you get started, upgrade your setup, advance, and even earn from sim racing. 

Are you ready? Follow to stay tuned!

#simracing #simulator #esports #app #pitlanesimracing

When you can't decide between a sim racing rig and a golf sim: both is the answer.

#simracing #golfsimulator #simulator #gameroom #pitlanesimracing

Have you looked at our FRS Lite Chassis and wondered how it could switch between Formula and GT positions easily? Only a video can do it justice!

Watch to see it in action and learn more about why the FRS Lite Chassis is in a class of one:

🏎️ Quickly switch between GT and F1 seating positions
💪 Ultra-rigid design using Heavy Duty alum extrusions and structural steel brackets
⚡ Motion ready
🎨 Customizable
🇨🇦 Fully fabricated and built in Canada

#simracing #simracer #simulator #esports #f1

sdealgaming.text:
💪[ESPORT] Virtual Sepang 1000KM powered by Castrol
1000KM Successfully Completed at Sepang Circuit

🏆Congratulations to all the podium drivers — your passion, skill, and remarkable perseverance truly impressed everyone.

Big thank you to all our partners @raceroomasia , @leonachin , @kurazmotorsports  for making this event possible. Your support has brought a new milestone to the world of sim racing.

Special appreciation to @thermaltake_global , @agonbyaoc , @iglcoatingsmalaysia , @gripmaxmalaysia , @spacewheelsmy  for their continuous and unwavering support.

#VirtualS1k #SDealMalaysia #Raceroom #LeonaChinMotorsport #KurazMotorsport

🔥 The Sepang Virtual S1K – Practice Day 1
Every participant today went all-out, fighting for every second and every corner. Hardcore mode ON. 💪🔥

Wishing all racers the best of luck tomorrow — may everyone complete the full 1000KM virtual endurance challenge smoothly. It’s going to be a good show. 🏁✨

Our Thermaltake Malaysia Motion Setup and AGON by AOC display units are also showcased at the venue, along with our full range of sim racing products. Everyone is welcome to visit and experience it!

Organisation by:  Sepang Circuit

Sanctioned By: MAM - Motorsports Association of Malaysia

Sponsored by:
@castrol.malaysia , @thermaltake_global , @agonbyaoc , @iglcoatingsmalaysia , @gripmaxmalaysia , @spacewheelsmy 

Promoting by:
@raceroomasia , @sdealgaming , @kurazmotorsports , @leonachin 

#VirtualS1k #Castrol #ThermaltakeMalaysia #AGONBYAOC
#MAM #SepangCircuit #RaceroomAsia #SDealGaming  #KurazMotorsport #LeonaChin #Petronas #SIC #Castrol  #IGLCoatings #GripmaxTyresMalaysia #SpaceWheels #MAM #SepangCircuit

@ajithkumar.0fficial ❤️ It was an absolute pleasure setting up the sim racing for you Ajith Sir. Truly honored to meet a humble and gracious legend in person at the filming studio. As a renowned actor and racer, his humility and graciousness toward others are truly admirable.

As it was our first time at a filming studio, we would like to extend our sincere thanks to Sivakumar (Filming Director) and Papoi (Operations Team) for taking great care of us throughout every single shoot.

The Indian filming team was extremely professional, and once again, thank you for allowing us to be part of this incredible experience.

⭐️ SDeal Team would like to wish you Merry Christmas and Happy New Year 2026. We hope to welcome you again in Malaysia. Wishing you and your team continued success in 2026.

A day to remember — 17/12/2025 #AjithSir 

#SDealMalaysia

With Resident Evil 9 releasing tomorrow, we couldn't resist building a killer PC inspired by the franchise: a white ASUS ROG Astral NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5090, a Ryzen 7 9850X3D, 96GB of RGB DDR5 RAM, an 8TB PCIe 5.0 NVMe SSD, and a TRYX Panorama liquid CPU cooler with its AMOLED display.

Huge thanks, Mick, for your order!

Avec la sortie de Resident Evil 9 demain, on ne pouvais pas s'empêcher de ous sortir un beau PC pour la franchise. Avec une Asus ROG Astral NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5090 blanche, un Ryzen 7 9850X3D, 96GB de RAM DDR5 RGB, 8TB de NVMe SSD 5.0 et un refroidisseur de processeur liquide TRYX Panorama avec son écran AMOLED.

Un gros merci Mick pour ta commande!

#ResidentEvilRequiem #pcmr #pcmasterrace #residentevil #residentevilpc #gamingpc

Salut, nous c’est NOX Gaming. 🔥

Notre mission? Assembler l’ordinateur de tes rêves. Celui qui répondra à TOUS tes besoins en matière de gaming. 🕹️
 
Pour rendre ton expérience avec nous hyper simple et accessible, on offre des options de financement + des conseils personnalisés, pour que tu vives l’expérience gaming de ta vie. 
 
En nous suivant sur les réseaux sociaux, tu auras droit à:
✔ Des conseils pour faire les meilleurs choix en matière de setup
✔ Tout ce qu’il faut pour être au courant des tendances de l’heure
✔ De l’inspiration, car on te partagera différents setups de feu, montés par notre belle communauté
 
Bienvenue au paradis du gaming. 👾
 
Abonne toi pour ne pas manquer le lancement de notre site web! 

_____
 
 
Hi, we're NOX Gaming. 🔥

Our mission? To assemble the computer of your dreams. The one that will meet ALL your gaming needs. 🕹️
 
To make your experience with us extra simple and accessible, we offer financing options + personalized advice, so you can have the gaming experience of a lifetime. 
 
By following us on social media, you'll get:
✔ Advice on making the best setup choices
✔ Everything you need to know about the latest trends
✔ Inspiration, as we'll share with you amazing setups by our beautiful community
 
Welcome to gaming heaven. 👾
 
Follow us to make sure you won't miss the upcoming launch of our website!

Take a quick tour of our 4000sq ft. showroom and explore a full range of simulation rigs, from entry-level to high-end configurations. We offer multiple brands of steering wheels, wheelbases, pedals, motion platforms, monitors, high-performance PCs, and all the accessories you need.

Beginner, a casual driver, a sim enthusiast, or a professional racer, we can customize the perfect setup for any discipline: racing, rally, truck, flight, and more.

We’re not just a walkin retail shop, we provide personalized consultations to ensure you get the right product and a setup that performs exactly as you need.

Book an appointment to try different configurations and discover what best suits you, from leisure to training. From kids to adults to real racing drivers, everyone’s welcome. 

Hosting events too! Birthday, team building, or friendly races, message us to book your slot!

📍1 Kaki Bukit Road 1 #02-46 Enterprise
One Singapore 415934
